reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.312(e)(1) focuses on transmission security, which is directly related to ensuring secure communication channels in Kubernetes. This can be achieved through NetworkPolicies to restrict ingress and egress traffic, enabling TLS for Ingress resources, and using mTLS in service meshes for secure service-to-service communication.
title: 164_312_e_1: 164.312(e)(1) Transmission security
